chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-90 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 29.04.2025 Mr. Shahid Hussain Gopang, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG alongwith Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto, CMO Municipal Committee, Khairpur ***************** Learned AAG has filed compliance report on behalf of Respondent No.3 along with an orginal cheque bearing No.49378668 amounting to Rs.457753/-, which has been handed over to the petitioner, who is present in person, after his proper acknowledgment of receipt. The same are taken on record. However, with regard to remaining amount, it is stated that same would be paid in equal installments of Rs.200,000/- each month till clearance of all the benefits. After such undertaking filed by the Respondent No.3, this petition is disposed of while issuing directions to the Respondent No.3 to fulfill the undertaking. In case of failure, contempt proceedings would be initiated against him. JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
